title: thalictrum minus subsp. expansum
intro: Thalictrum minus subsp. expansum, also known as meadow rue, is a perennial plant in the ranunculaceae family, characterized by its delicate, feathery foliage and vibrant purple flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of meadow rue include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and soothe digestive issues, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for colds and flu. Herbal preparations of meadow rue typically involve infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water to create a tea, or using the plant's roots to make a tincture or infusion.
